primary_claim: FibroDynMix links raw UMI counts to continuous fibroblast state weights, study/donor-adjusted count fits, uncertainty summaries, transfer readouts, and cross-sectional flow outputs.
claim_boundary: Architecture and evidence-spine figure; not a standalone biological validation, causal-transition claim, clinical biomarker claim, or complete hierarchical VI implementation.
current_scope: NB optimizer, study/donor-effect optimization, study-effect calibration, bootstrap uncertainty, logistic-normal VI posterior-mean skeleton, transition flow, public raw-count smoke run, leave-study-out transfer benchmark, and public real-data transfer smoke.
remaining_scope: Full amortized or fully hierarchical VI posterior over all parameters and completed human disease-atlas or cross-atlas generalization.
